{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1549455?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cristianstaicu/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cristianstaicu/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cristianstaicu/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cristianstaicu/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/cristianstaicu", "id": 1549455, "login": "cristianstaicu", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjE1NDk0NTU=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cristianstaicu/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cristianstaicu/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cristianstaicu/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cristianstaicu/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/cristianstaicu/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/cristianstaicu", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-53597", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:P/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-94", "name": "Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')"}], "description": "## Summary
The TypeScript Prompty loader used `gray-matter` without overriding executable frontmatter engines. `gray-matter` supports JavaScript frontmatter blocks such as `---js` and evaluates them while parsing. An attacker-controlled `.prompty` file could therefore execute arbitrary JavaScript during prompt loading.

## Affected package
- npm `@prompty/core` v2 prerelease line: `>= 2.0.0-alpha.1 < 2.0.0-beta.3`
- Fixed in `@prompty/core@2.0.0-beta.3`

The legacy v1 JavaScript runtime had a historical hardening change for this issue. During the v2 TypeScript runtime rebuild, the loader again called `gray-matter` directly and the vulnerable behavior was present in the v2 prerelease packages until `2.0.0-beta.3`.

## Impact
Applications that load untrusted `.prompty` files, user-provided prompt paths, or prompt bundles from less-trusted locations could execute arbitrary JavaScript in the host Node.js process during frontmatter parsing.

## Remediation
Upgrade `@prompty/core` to `2.0.0-beta.3` or later.

The fix explicitly overrides the `js` and `javascript` gray-matter engines and rejects JavaScript frontmatter in `.prompty` files. Prompty frontmatter is YAML-only; executable frontmatter is unsupported. A regression test now verifies that `---js` frontmatter is rejected and not evaluated.

## Fix details
Fixed by commit `c27402da2487075be577f06aa79df627fb9d6853` and released via `typescript/2.0.0-beta.3`.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0093, "percentile": 0.56623}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-c4gh-rv8h-q9vw", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-17T19:53:34Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c4gh-rv8h-q9vw", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-c4gh-rv8h-q9vw"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-53597"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-07-16T16:19:12Z", "published_at": "2026-07-17T19:53:34Z", "references": ["https://github.com/microsoft/prompty/security/advisories/GHSA-c4gh-rv8h-q9vw", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-53597", "https://github.com/microsoft/prompty/commit/c27402da2487075be577f06aa79df627fb9d6853", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c4gh-rv8h-q9vw"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/microsoft/prompty/security-advisories/GHSA-c4gh-rv8h-q9vw", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/microsoft/prompty", "summary": "Prompty: Arbitrary code execution via JavaScript frontmatter in TypeScript loader", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-17T19:53:37Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-c4gh-rv8h-q9vw", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.0.0-beta.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@prompty/core"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.0.0-alpha.1, < 2.0.0-beta.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Prompty: Arbitrary code execution via JavaScript frontmatter in TypeScript loader
